candidates.why: Change in cash, not cash balance.

candidates.why: Best direct match for short-term debt/current borrowings; excludes leases.
Non-current debt, not STD.

candidates.row_label: Long Term Debt Maturing within 1 Year
candidates.why: Also fits current portion of long-term debt, but appears supplemental and overlaps with current borrowings in some years; avoid double counting when a clean current borrowings line exists.

variables.notes: Chose 'Current borrowings' as the clean current debt total. Excluded lease liabilities per instruction and avoided adding 'Long Term Debt Maturing within 1 Year' to prevent potential double counting with current borrowings.

candidates.why: Exact match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities.

Cash flow adjustment, not balance sheet PPE stock.

candidates.why: Capex flow, not PPE balance.

candidates.why: Disposal cash inflow, not PPE balance.
Intangible assets, not PPE.

candidates.why: Intangible component, not PPE.
Intangible component, not PPE.
